data.title: Aave Reports Significant Increase in USDT Borrowing and Lending Rates
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Aave indicates that the annual percentage yield (APY) for borrowing USDT has surged to 15.75%, while the lending APY has climbed to 13.65%. These figures represent the highest levels observed in the past six months.

data.title: Bitget released its Q2 transparency report, with spot growth rate ranking second in the world
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget released a transparency report for the second quarter of 2025, and the data showed that the number of global users of the platform ecosystem has exceeded 120 million. According to CoinGecko spot trading volume data, Bitget currently ranks second among global cryptocurrency exchanges.
The report pointed out that Bitget has recently continued to promote globalization and product ecosystem layout in multiple dimensions. In terms of charity, the platform has reached a three-year charity cooperation with the United Nations Children's Fund (UNICEF). In terms of sports cooperation, it has become a regional partner of the World Motorcycle Championship (MotoGP) and has cooperated with driver Jorge Lorenzo; in terms of compliance, the platform has obtained relevant licenses in El Salvador and Georgia, further expanding its international compliance path. In addition, Bitget destroyed 30 million platform tokens BGB this quarter, with a destruction value of approximately US$138 million. In terms of products and functions, Bitget launched the Bitget PRO mode for institutions and professional traders this quarter, and also launched the AI trading assistant GetAgent and the native live broadcast function Bitget Live to expand trading scenarios and build a diversified trading experience.
According to the second quarter 2025 cryptocurrency exchange report released by TokenInsight, Bitget's market share in both spot and derivatives has increased. Among them, the spot quarterly growth rate ranks second in the world, and the open interest market share ranks third in the world.

data.title: Thai listed company DV8 completes 241 million baht financing and transforms into a cryptocurrency reserve company
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Thai listed company DV8 has completed 241 million baht (about 7.4 million US dollars) in financing and transformed into Southeast Asia's first cryptocurrency reserve company. DV8 plans to establish a Bitcoin treasury by drawing on MicroStrategy's successful experience in converting financing into cryptocurrency reserves to increase shareholder value (cryptocurrency per share).

data.title: Messari: Stablecoin market capitalization hits a new high of $258.5 billion, transaction volume decreases but fees surge
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Messari Weekly, the total market value of stablecoins reached $258.5 billion, a record high, up 2.7% month-on-month. The average daily transaction volume of stablecoins rebounded by 13.2% to $143.1 billion, reversing last week's decline, but still down 6.3% month-on-month. However, the number of transactions fell 10% week-on-week to 35.3 million. The divergence between transaction volume and transaction number may reflect an increase in the average transaction size or increased institutional activity.
The average daily transaction fee of stablecoins increased by 8.9% week-on-week to $23 million, showing strong demand for stablecoin applications. Small protocols performed well, with Sky fees surging 362.0% to $1.5 million this week, Ethena up 367.8% to $613,700, and Usual fees soaring 8142.4% to $64,700. The increase in fees indicates a significant increase in user engagement on major and emerging stablecoin platforms.

data.title: FCA Seizes Cryptocurrency ATMs and Arrests Two in Illegal Exchange Operation
data.description: According to PANews, the United Kingdom's Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) has confiscated seven cryptocurrency ATMs and detained two individuals suspected of operating an unauthorized cryptocurrency exchange. The FCA's actions are part of ongoing efforts to regulate and monitor cryptocurrency activities within the country, ensuring compliance with financial laws and regulations.

data.title: Stablecoin Market Reaches Record High with Increased Trading Activity
data.description:
According to Odaily, the total market capitalization of stablecoins has reached a historic high of $258.5 billion, marking a 2.7% increase from the previous month. The average daily trading volume of stablecoins has rebounded by 13.2% to $143.1 billion, reversing last week's decline, although it remains 6.3% lower compared to the previous month. However, the number of transactions has decreased by 10% week-on-week, totaling 35.3 million. This divergence between trading volume and transaction count may indicate an increase in average transaction size or heightened institutional activity.

The average daily transaction fees for stablecoins have risen by 8.9% week-on-week, reaching $23 million, demonstrating strong demand for stablecoin applications. Smaller protocols have shown impressive performance, with Sky's fees surging by 362.0% to $1.5 million, Ethena's increasing by 367.8% to $613,700, and Usual's fees skyrocketing by 8142.4% to $64,700. The growth in fees suggests a significant increase in user engagement across both major and emerging stablecoin platforms.

data.title: An Ethereum IC0 participant deposited 729 ETH worth $2.53 million to Kraken
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to OnchainLens monitoring, an Ethereum IC0 participant deposited 729 ETH worth $2.53 million to Kraken. This participant spent $416 to get 1,337 ETH during the ICO, and currently still holds 495 ETH (US$2.07 million) in pledge.

data.title: USDT lending APY on Aave soared to 16.01%, reaching its peak in half a year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of Ai Yi, an analyst on the chain, the APY of USDT lending on Aave has soared to 16.01%, reaching the peak in half a year. The last time such crazy borrowing of U was at BTCATH in December last year - USDT issued 1 billion more and Binance USDT financial management interest rate rose to 4%.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 720 USDT with a 3.63% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jul 17, 2025, 09:49 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 720 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 720.22998 USDT, with a narrowed 3.63% increase in 24 hours.
